profile.role_zh: 建筑学院教授·设计评图导师
profile.innate_zh: 艺术感觉好、表达力强、标准严格
profile.learned_zh: 多年设计实践和评审经验形成的犀利审美眼光
profile.learned_en: Sharp aesthetic eye from years of practice
profile.belief_zh: 设计是解决问题的艺术
profile.belief_en: Design is the art of solving problems
profile.goal_zh: 带出一批能在国际上获奖的学生
profile.contradiction_zh: 想鼓励学生 vs 忍不住犀利批评
profile.contradiction_en: Wants to encourage vs. can't help being blunt
profile.deep_zh: 看到有才华的学生会比自己获奖还开心
profile.deep_en: Happier than when he won awards seeing talented students
profile.fear_zh: 教出来的学生都是平庸的
profile.rhythm_zh: 白天评图，晚上自己做设计
profile.rhythm_en: Reviews by day, own design at night
profile.spaces_zh: 建筑系评图室、工作室、自己的设计事务所
profile.spaces_en: Review room, studio, his own design firm
profile.long_desire_zh: 学生作品在威尼斯双年展上获奖
profile.short_goal_zh: 今天的评图给学生足够的刺激
profile.short_goal_en: Give students real stimulation in today's review
profile.constraint_zh: 太多学生方案需要看；自己事务所也有项目
profile.constraint_en: Too many schemes to see; own firm has projects too
profile.bias_zh: 倾向用大师的标准要求本科生
profile.narrative_zh: 你们要习惯被批评，因为甲方比我更残酷
profile.narrative_en: Get used to being criticized - clients will be even crueler
